text.title: Recruiting Process (Full-Cycle) Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 7-step procedure to apply Recruiting Process (Full-Cycle). Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: define-persona
step.input: Hiring manager intake notes, top-performer profiles
step.action: Convert vague 'someone like X' into concrete sourceable attributes (experience range, current role, motivations, channels).
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: design-sourcing
step.action: Pick ≥3 channels covering both active and passive candidates; remove non-essential degree requirements.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: rewrite-jd
step.action: Limit must-haves to 5-7, nice-to-haves to 3-4; check mobile rendering on a real device.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: post-internally-first
step.action: Open the role internally for the policy-defined window before external posting.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: run-screening
step.action: Apply scorecard criteria; reject early on must-have gaps.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: run-structured-interviews
step.action: Execute structured interviews; debrief same day.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: extend-offer-within-48h
step.action: Send the offer letter within 48 hours of decision; brief recruiter is the single point of contact during negotiation.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
